title: Global Deforestation Slows, W.R.I. Report Finds. But Wildfires Are Taking a Toll.
summary_full: In 2025, the world razed less forest than any other year in the last decade. The bad news: global warming is making wildfires more frequent and intense.
summary_public: In 2025, the world razed less forest than any other year in the last decade. The bad news: global warming is making wildfires more frequent and intense.
